title: hieracium silsinum subsp. silsinum
intro: Hieracium silsinum subsp. silsinum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its small yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium silsinum subsp. silsinum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
